root_cause_or_best_diagnosis: The production 500 was most likely an OpenAI model request or model-parameter compatibility failure that the route collapsed into a generic generation failure. The original route did not expose safe stage-specific diagnostics.
repair_made: Added safe generation model resolution with fallback for malformed configured model text.
Added model-family token parameter selection between max_tokens and max_completion_tokens.
Added controlled response codes for model request failure, model response invalid, timeout, missing model configuration, snapshot unavailable, and privacy scan failure.
Added safe server-side diagnostics with generation stage, safe error code, HTTP status, model name, and booleans for snapshot/model/parse/privacy state.

model_call_pattern.model_resolution: DARREN_INTELLIGENCE_OPENAI_MODEL, then OPENAI_MODEL, then gpt-4o-2024-08-06 fallback
model_call_pattern.token_parameter: max_completion_tokens for newer completion-token model families; max_tokens for standard chat-completion model families

production_smoke_test_plan: Confirm existing sales dashboard and Darren snapshot APIs still pass invalid and valid auth checks.
Confirm POST /api/admin/darren-intelligence-generate with invalid code returns 403.
Run exactly one valid generation request.
Report only counts, required future names presence, one_move field presence, persistence_saved, and safety exposure booleans.
limits: No production valid generation test run in this repair sprint
